scene_input.scene_summary: Abū Lahab hits Abū Rāfiʿ for no reason.
scene_input.key_visual_action: Abū Lahab swinging his fist at Abū Rāfiʿ

schema_output.scene_summary: Abū Lahab hits Abū Rāfiʿ for no reason.
schema_output.source_reference: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, p. 150
schema_output.moral_lesson: The importance of self-control and respect for others.

characters.name: Abū Lahab
characters.appearance: tall build, muscular posture, wearing a dark brown thobe with a red woolen cloak draped over both shoulders and a black turban with a cloth tail hanging between the shoulder blades

characters.name: Abū Rāfiʿ
characters.appearance: medium build, slightly stooped shoulders, wearing a light brown thobe and plain beige woolen cloak with a white cloth head covering

schema_output.narrative_text: Abū Lahab's anger gets the better of him and he hits Abū Rāfiʿ for no reason. Abū Rāfiʿ is shocked and hurt.

compliance.notes: The scene shows Abū Lahab's anger and aggression, but it does not depict graphic violence.

schema_output.image_prompt: Children's watercolor storybook illustration, soft warm hand-painted style for ages 6-12. Bustling Medina marketplace with a packed dirt floor and rows of colorful stalls selling dates, grains, and other goods. Late afternoon sunlight casts long shadows across the scene. A tall figure in the center, the central figure seen from behind: medium build, muscular posture, wearing a dark brown thobe with a red woolen cloak draped over both shoulders and a black turban with a cloth tail hanging between the shoulder blades, swinging his fist at a slender figure standing nearby. The second figure, seen from behind, has slightly stooped shoulders, wearing a light brown thobe and plain beige woolen cloak with a white cloth head covering, startled and turning away from the sudden attack. A crowd of onlookers in the background, some of whom are gasping in shock, while others are trying to intervene. Soft warm golden light, lively and dynamic mood. Medium shot from a slight angle, capturing the drama and tension of the scene. Warm beige, golden, and sandy palette with the red cloak as a color anchor. No modern objects, historically accurate 7th century scene.
